title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 50
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost umbrella.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your umbrella? You sounded worried this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the train, because I remembered standing near the doors. || Woman: And did you check the bookshop? You were there later. || Man: I did, but it was not there. Then my friend called and said [1]my umbrella was beside the café door[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Woman: Good. You would need it today. || Man: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your umbrella? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the train, because I remembered standing near the doors.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you check the bookshop? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my friend called and said my umbrella was beside the café door. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the umbrella?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, umbrella beside a café door, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, umbrella near train doors, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, umbrella inside a bookshop, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my umbrella was beside the café door.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to watch a play this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. The tickets cost too much, so that plan will not work. || Woman: We could go to the lake instead. || Man: I checked, but it is too cold. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are playing laser games after school[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Man: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to watch a play this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The tickets cost too much, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could go to the lake instead.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it is too cold. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are playing laser games after school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, teenagers playing a laser game, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the science club.
questions.audio_script: Man: What do we need to take for the science club tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Woman: The teacher said we do not need to bring gloves, because they have enough for everybody. || Man: What about a calculator? || Woman: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring an empty jar because we are collecting pond water samples[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Woman: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Boy: I first thought about fish pie, but it is not ready yet. || Girl: The tomato pasta looks good too. || Boy: Maybe, but I make that at home often. I think [1]I will have the roast chicken because it includes potatoes[/1]. || Girl: Good choice. I will order after you. || Boy: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the revision class.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the revision class today. Please do not go to the classroom eight, because another group is there. Some students may wait by the library, but there are no free tables. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the computer suite after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the revision class today. Please do not go to the classroom eight, because another group is there. Some students may wait by the library, but there are no free tables. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the computer suite after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the concert hall.
questions.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting to the concert hall tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the taxi. || Girl: I was, but it is expensive on Friday evenings. || Boy: Could you use the car instead? || Girl: I checked, but parking is difficult. [1]I am going to take the underground because it goes straight there[/1]. || Boy: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Girl: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a community centre.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the community centre this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to set out chairs. || Girl: Not now, because the cleaner did it earlier. || Woman: So will you paint the wall? || Girl: No, the paint has not arrived. The manager said [1]my job today is to welcome visitors at the door[/1]. || Woman: That sounds clear enough. || Girl: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
